rows.label: tev010902_MSG0001
rows.name:
My Aphrodite is a work of art, and I would
have given anything to prevent her from
being damaged by the likes of that rogue![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010902_MSG0002
rows.name:
But alas! Now I won't be able to proceed
with my Arms duties for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010902_MSG0003
rows.name:
This crime can never be excused.
Gods may forgive, but my keen
sense of aesthetics does not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010902_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmmm? Do you need something? Forgive me, but I'm
in no mood for idle chitchat with strangers. If
you have some business with me, it must wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010902_MSG0005
rows.name:
Surely you also have times where you
don't feel like speaking with people?[ST:wait ]
